rationale: The skill is primarily a prose guideline for writing, reviewing, and refactoring React/Next.js code, so its representative use implies reading the project’s React/Next source files and possibly writing modified components, pages, or app source. It explicitly tells the agent to read detailed rule files under rules/ and the compiled AGENTS.md guide. It declares no external APIs, network services, install steps, or command-line tools, so hosts and subprocesses are empty.
